burden.dalyPerCapita: low population burden; risk of sudden cardiac death
burden.mortalityRate: Low overall; higher in high-risk subsets

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Unexplained LV wall thickness on echocardiography or MRI; family history and genetic testing support

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate; access to MRI/genetics and ICDs varies

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Echocardiography in referral centers; MRI and genetics limited
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Beta-blockers or calcium channel blockers; ICD for high-risk; septal reduction in select centers
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Limited genetic testing and uneven access to ICDs
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Specialized cardiology centers in major cities
